ADB_LCU_C1A_HS_V11

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference ADB_LCU_C1A_HS_V11_20211210T135322.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 18DA71F2
Receive ID 18DAF271
Functional Addr 16
Functional Name ADB-LCU
